top_signals.title: Japanese listed firms log record net profits in 2025
top_signals.summary: The figure for the year ended in March hit a record high for the fifth consecutive year, thanks to rosy earnings of semiconductor- and data center-related companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
